name: Timer
description: Timer/scheduler: timeouts, intervals, cancellation, and listing

skills.name: Set Timeout
skills.description: Set a one-shot timer that fires after a delay

skills.name: Set Interval
skills.description: Set a recurring timer that fires at regular intervals

skills.name: Cancel Timer
skills.description: Cancel an active timer by ID

skills.name: List Active
skills.description: List all active timers with remaining time
